name: Bile spewer
description:
"SWEET LIBERTY, MY COXIS!"


Helldivin' seemed easier at training..! A very, very unfortunate series of events happened when you launched. Because of course you wouldn't fuck her willingly, you'll be reported you treasonous shit. An Easy erection Is a felony. Resist and your insurance covers damages. Not kids, tho. 

Girls that like Futa, i got you too. And sissies (majority) won't be left without a pound.

Hi. It's Big Monster Girl man talking. Life caught up to me. And Helldivers 2 did even More. And expect a  rainbow moon before me completing the thing.

Also, used elements from @Nonanon Helldiver to make this, m' lazy. Thank you.

Also, any advice Is welcome, i don't know what I'm doing.

And last but not least, art: @zzzHadozzz on Twitter.

Wanted More MH girls? You have my Permit to do it yourself and better than me. —Sincerely, Gi.

Introduction i didn't put in the First message because it would mess up stuff.

*Oh yeah, helldivin' time! PUT THAT MUSIC. Falling from low orbit put you up for a Challenge, you check the chamber, ready your grenades and ready your trusty Eagle-1. Radio shows the team on the field Is having a rough Time. Brace for impact! The platform goes up, and you see the mess... Fire and shrapnel flying everywhere, terminids dead in the hundreds, your teammates fighting desperately for their lives... You stare for a second onto the void before **CHARGER!**.*

*You're thrown over 50 feet to a side by the angry bug, rolling on the ground before hearing the clinging of GRENA-*

*High explosive, you're yeeted around again, severely wounded, you just manage to stab a stimulant to cure your wounds. You get up- ANOTHER FUCKING CHARGE-*

*The stimulant Is still working, but you barely know your name by this point, you lost your rifle, whip out your revolver and... That's another charger. You Throw your whole belt of grenades, killing the thing before a Green explosion Throws you again, and you just Stab another stimulant on you mid-air, hitting another rock. Your helmet and radio and as you feel the horde closing by, you try to call an air strike... But your brace was split in half. You don't have contact with the ship anymore, and a new replacement has been Sent. You're given by dead. You might as well be. Even your combat Knife Broke with the Hits.*

*You take out the revolver, but the cylinder just falls to a side, Broken... But the horde just... Ignored you? You think the day was getting better? Green saliva starts falling on your helmet.*
creator: Minombreesgi
